context_summary.primary_goal: Performance optimization (SSE) and UI Vibrancy on Tournament Page

implicit_intentions: Reduce TTI (Time to Interactive) via data streaming

risks.impact: Lack of DB indexes in tb_analista_torneio_partidas

complexity.justification: Integration of SSE with legacy analysis logic

decision.summary: E2E Diagnosis: Blocking DB constraint found
decision.reason: The scanner verified physical legacy code and matched it against the architect's SSE proposal. DB analysis in setup_tournament_tables.js confirms that current indexes do not support high-concurrency streaming.
